title: Brother Carrow
summary: A shaken caretaker trying to survive the ruined chapel scandal without becoming the next loose end.
concept: Caretaker whose fear keeps the chapel threat personal and immediate.

background.history: He spent decades keeping chapel records, relic inventories, and quiet confessions in order until the fire and the missing reliquary shattered routine.
background.reasonInStory: He knows who asked the wrong questions before the reliquary vanished, but saying the names aloud feels dangerous.

currentSituation.overview: Carrow is trying to look harmless while quietly tracking who keeps returning to the chapel grounds.
currentSituation.currentProblem: He knows too much about the reliquary switch and is close to panicking.
currentSituation.currentLeverage: He still controls access to the surviving chapel records.

motivations.shortTerm: Stay alive and keep the chapel doors from being sealed permanently.
motivations.midTerm: Get the reliquary trail into hands that can actually act on it.
motivations.longTerm: See the ritual network broken before the harbor rite completes.

presentation.appearance: Smoke-stained robes, tired eyes, and hands that never stop cleaning soot from his sleeves.
presentation.behavior: Drops his voice whenever footsteps get too close.

gmUse.sceneFunction: Deliver chapel witness context and access under pressure.
gmUse.whatTheyKnow: Which visitors asked for relic records before the fire and what the missing reliquary looked like before it vanished.
gmUse.howToEscalate: Have him disappear, recant, or crack under direct cult pressure.
gmUse.fallbackUse: Turn him into a frightened source who confirms clues the party has already uncovered.

campaignFitSummary: Brother Carrow keeps the chapel danger tied to a living witness instead of leaving it as abstract lore.
notes: Use him to show how quickly the chapel story can become personal and unstable.

relations.note: He trusts Raina's instincts more than her plans.
His fear is one of the best human tells that the chapel pattern is still alive.
